---
title: "LRP73base: Letter-sound to word reading with age main effect, no interaction"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRP73base is the no-interaction companion to [LRP73](../lrp-rli-mech-073/). It keeps the
same letter-sound mechanism, word-reading outcome, subject random intercept and
age main effect, but sets `include_interaction=False`, so there is no
letter-sound x age `gamma_int` term.

The purpose is a nested comparison: LRP73 versus LRP73base asks whether age
moderation improves predictive fit beyond the age main effect. The mechanism
curve and age terms remain adjusted associations, not causal effects.

## Model

$$
\eta = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{phase}}
  + \beta_G G
  + f^L(\operatorname{logit}_* L_{\text{post}})
  + \gamma_{\text{mod}} z(A)
  + \gamma_{\text{own}}\operatorname{logit}_*(W_{\text{pre}})
  + \gamma_E \operatorname{logit}_*(E_{\text{post}})
  + \gamma_R \operatorname{logit}_*(R_{\text{post}})
  + u_{\text{child}}.
$$

`gamma_mod` is the age main effect at the mean of the letter-sound mechanism.
The omitted term is the LRP73 interaction
`gamma_int * z(logit L_post) * z(age)`.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_results_mechanism.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
